subject: Hatsune Miku in an industrial-punk outfit — dark fitted jacket with structured collar, black-and-teal color scheme, signature long twin tails, performing on a stage-like platform with geometric industrial set pieces behind her
suspected_ip: Hatsune Miku (Factory Tyrant module, Project DIVA F)
description: A close-to-mid shot of a teal-haired figure with long twin tails in a dark punk-industrial outfit. The jacket is black with structured angular elements and what appears to be a choker-style collar detail. The figure's eyes are a vivid red, which is visually distinctive and contrasts strongly with the teal hair — a clear departure from Miku's default blue-green eyes and a hallmark identifier for the Factory Tyrant module. The figure's pose is dynamic and forward-leaning, one hand raised near the face in a dramatic performance gesture. The background features dark angular industrial shapes and geometric lighting in teal and deep purple tones, reinforcing an underground factory-stage aesthetic. The card frame is dark with a yellow-gold trim consistent with the Weiss Schwarz PD set.
foreground: Teal-haired performer in black structured jacket, hand raised toward face, angular industrial platform elements
background: Dark industrial geometric shapes, deep purple and teal atmospheric lighting
emotion: intense, defiant performance energy — figure is fully in command of the stage
